Package org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.annotation

@API(status=STABLE, since="0.0.1") package org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.annotation
Some specialised annotations.
  • Annotation Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    ClassVersion
    This annotation will be used to provide version information for each class in a project.
    ProgramClass
    This is the marker annotation for a "Main" class.
    UtilityClass
    This is a marker annotation for a utility class.
